feed.title: xiaoxin16@Chirpy
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: DNS
Template
entry.summary:
[toc]{type: “ul”, level: [1,2,3]}
自动提交之github linux
自动保存密码 git config --global credential.helper store
自动提交脚本 # --run-- #!/bin/bash cd /home/xyh/PycharmProjects/xiaoxin16.github.io git add . git commit -m "lalala" # git push -u origin master git push cd ..
xxx
windows
自动提交

entry.title: Python学习
entry.summary:
[toc]{type: “ul”, level: [1,2,3]}
python Anaconda
安装与卸载 ``` 安装 sh Anaconda3-2019.10-Linux-x86_64.sh
卸载 rm -fr /home/xyh/anaconda3 删除 bashrc vim ~/.bashrc source ~/.bashrc - 代码测试 ```python # --run-- print('HELLOWORLD')
配置 ``` 源设置 $ vim .condarc
channels:
defaults show_channel_urls: true default_channels: https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/anaconda/pkgs/ma...

entry.title: Enable Google Page Views
entry.summary:
The content of this post applies only to Universal Analytics property (UA), not Google Analytics 4 (GA 4). In addition, since UA is about to be deprecated on Jul 1, 2023, the Page Views feature of Chirpy will also be deprecated at that time.
This post is to enable Page Views on the Chirpy theme based blog that you just built. This requires technical knowledge and it’s recommended to keep t...

entry.title: Customize the Favicon
entry.summary:
The favicons of Chirpy are placed in the directory assets/img/favicons/. You may want to replace them with your own. The following sections will guide you to create and replace the default favicons.
Generate the favicon
Prepare a square image (PNG, JPG, or SVG) with a size of 512x512 or more, and then go to the online tool Real Favicon Generator and click the button Select your Favicon image ...
